task_summary: Repair Administratum current truth HEAD drift after New Reality move without unrelated mutation.
out_of_scope: Do not build the post-work organ admission ring in this task.
Do not modify Ancient Empire, parent folders, or any path outside E:/IMPERIUM_NEW_GENERATION_NEW_REALITY.
Do not refactor unrelated organs, tools, IDE, WARP, CLI worker, visual systems, or reports.
Do not claim global clean pass, semantic truth pass, or production autonomy.
success_criteria: current_head_card_v0_1.json reflects the actual local git HEAD at task start or explains a justified mismatch with evidence.
A minimal Administratum report records old_head, actual_head, repaired fields, files touched, and validation commands.
Astronomicon task essence and route packet for this task validate through the available Astronomicon checkers.
Administratum card/current-truth validation is run if available; unavailable validators are reported as UNKNOWN_WITH_REASON, not PASS.
Git status, commit hash, and optional remote head proof are recorded without fake green.

risks_and_gates.risk: Servitor may accidentally mutate old Imperium or parent paths instead of New Reality root.
required_evidence: changed file list restricted to New Reality

risks_and_gates.risk: current truth card may be updated mechanically while other linked current-truth indexes remain stale.
A small correction task may expand into unrelated architecture work.
Missing validators or missing remote proof may be incorrectly reported as PASS.

stop_conditions: Git branch is not master or origin is not SoulsLike2313/Imperium-New-Reality.git.
Working tree is dirty before registration/execution and the dirt is not from this task registration.
current_head_card_v0_1.json is missing or structurally unreadable.
A required correction would require Ancient/parent/private path access without explicit salvage admission.
Validation produces BLOCK/FAIL and cannot be repaired within this task scope.
